Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This seems to conflict with one of your other patches. You might have accidentally fixed the same file twice? Or maybe you need to rebase on top of that other patch?

Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Failed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne-arm on RHEL 8.8/aarch64, RHEL 8.8/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest 2 from trevis-108vm11: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/4b681325-c7d8-4cbe-ae9c-0f17fa81eb5a ran 5 tests.  1 tests failed: sanity.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

It is patch https://review.whamcloud.com/54005 that this is conflicting with, but they are both making slightly different changes.  it looks like 54005 is fixing more LOC, but this one is changing more files.

It probably makes sense to rebase this patch onto 54005 since it is ready to go, and remove the conflicting lines/files from this patch to keep them isolated instead of making a single larger patch.

Patch Set 2:

> It probably makes sense to rebase this patch onto 54005 since it is
 > ready to go, and remove the conflicting lines/files from this patch

Well, strictly speaking, it shouldn't be *pushed* as a rebase onto 54005, but that should be done locally to de-conflict the patches, and then rebased back onto master and pushed as a separate patch so that they don't have unnecessary conflicts.

This patch mostly fixes warnings. Errors were almost 0 for these files. I will update this. Thanks

commit.subject: LU-6142 llite: Fix style issues under lustre/llite
commit.message:
LU-6142 llite: Fix style issues under lustre/llite

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for all files under folder lustre/llite

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I5906f10d4704d844103b3a75f1ed1f4bb0effcd4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54138
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
